channel.title: Oops, something went wrong
channel.description:
<!--
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
--> Hello,
The problem I'm facing is trying to load the example startup project using my existing Wordpress website https://khmerlife.com
This is the error I'm seeing.
{ ServerError: Internal Server Error at Object.then.response (webpack-internal:///./node_modules/@frontity/wp-source/src/libraries/api.ts:31:184) at process._tickCallback (internal/process/next_tick.js:68:7) name: 'ServerError', status: 500, statusText: 'Internal Server Error' }
My API endpoint is https://khmerlife.com/wp-json
I've followed all of the startup guidelines but am unable to have any success loading posts. I do have a a custom theme running on my site but not sure how that will affect my blog posts. Anyone run into the same issue? Is it just content related?

item.title: Oops, something went wrong
item.dc:creator: calore912
item.description:
I have exactly the same problem!

I haven’t developed the project for a while, so I decided to run it and found the same error. I can’t find a solution or reason for this. I worked with my custom theme and everything was fine before.

Read full topic

item.title: Oops, something went wrong
item.dc:creator: andrash
item.description:
I changed in frontity.settings.js the url to my own - it worked for me. I think the problems are on the side test.frontity.org

Read full topic

item.title: Oops, something went wrong
item.dc:creator: amagee12
item.description:
I’m having the same problem as you. Were you able to figure out what was going on?

Read full topic

item.title: Oops, something went wrong
item.dc:creator: andrash
item.description:
I have the same problem

Read full topic

item.title: Oops, something went wrong
item.dc:creator: eng.aminld
item.description:
I got the same errors for fresh frontity installation that use “URL: https://test.frontity.org”

and troubleshooting page doesn’t help me.

Read full topic

item.title: Oops, something went wrong
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @chanrith

Welcome to the Frontity community. Having a custom theme running on your WordPress site won’t affect Frontity at all. Can you provide a link to a repo of your project so that we can take a look at your code. Thanks.

Meanwhile, also try these trouble shooting steps.

Read full topic

item.title: Oops, something went wrong
item.dc:creator: chanrith
item.description:
Hello,

The problem I’m facing is trying to load the example startup project using my existing Wordpress website https://khmerlife.com

This is the error I’m seeing.

{ ServerError: Internal Server Error
at Object.then.response (webpack-internal:///./node_modules/@frontity/wp-source/src/libraries/api.ts:31:184)
at process._tickCallback (internal/process/next_tick.js:68:7)

name: ‘ServerError’,
status: 500,
statusText: ‘Internal Server Error’ }

My API endpoint is https://khmerlife.com/wp-json

I’ve followed all of the startup guidelines but am unable to have any success loading posts. I do have a a custom theme running on my site but not sure how that will affect my blog posts. Anyone run into the same issue? Is it just content related?

Read full topic
